description: The Arpenaz 10 backpack is a great insulated bag for picnics. Comfortable and cool with separate compartments, it's a comfortable carry to school as well.Capacity: 10 insulated litres, with a 1 x 1 litre side pocketInsulation: Can keep belongings warm for 4 hours in a temperature of 5°C to 15°C Warranty: 5 years Made of 100% PU-coated PES outer, 100% PU-coated polyamide inner and 100% polyethylene padding for durability and comfort One main zippered compartment with a padded back, one outer zippered compartment and padded shoulder straps Waist strap for added comfort Thumb hooks for resting on the bag when walking CareStore backpack in a dry placeDo not machine wash, tumble dry, dry clean, bleach or ironHand wash using luke warm soapy waterUse waterproofing spray after a few years to renew water-repellant property of the Fabric
